description: Continuous Web Maintenance & Support to keep your site at its best. Ensure smooth operation and growth with your business — without searching for a developer every time.
custom_plan_note: Need custom retainer? Contact us for tailored proposal.
addons_desc: Enhance your retainer with additional services
cta_desc: Lock in your retainer plan before increases. Start with free site analysis.
cta_subtext: Book Free Consultation - Limited spots available
existing_site_note: Already have a site that needs maintenance?
existing_site_subnote: We don't have to have built it. We take over maintenance and evolution of any Next.js site.

included.title: New Features & Changes
included.desc: Adding new pages, sections, forms or functionalities. As many changes as you need within your retainer budget.
included.benefit: Increase conversions with new features without worrying about technical implementation

included.title: Security Updates
included.desc: Dependency updates, vulnerability patching, monitoring for unusual activity. Your site remains secure.
included.benefit: Protect your customer data and maintain their trust

included.title: Performance Monitoring
included.desc: Core Web Vitals tracking, uptime monitoring, Lighthouse scores. Alerts if something breaks.
included.benefit: Maximum uptime and fast performance for better user experience and SEO

included.title: Dependency Management
included.desc: Next.js, React, packages updates. Compatibility testing after each update.
included.benefit: Stay updated with latest technologies without compatibility issues

included.title: Uptime Alerts
included.desc: 24/7 monitoring. If site goes down, we get notified immediately and bring it back up.
included.benefit: Immediate response to downtime so you don't lose customers and revenue

included.title: Priority Support
included.desc: Direct access to developer. We answer questions and bugs with priority handling.
included.benefit: Fast solutions to your problems without waiting and delays

why_retainer: No need to find a developer every time
We already know the code — no onboarding time
Your site evolves with your business
Single point of contact for everything

testimonials.name: Giannis Papadopoulos
testimonials.content: Thanks to adinfinity's ongoing maintenance, we have steadily improved our site's performance and never worry about unexpected downtime.

testimonials.name: Eleni Nikolau
testimonials.content: The retainer saved us from many crises. Immediate support and regular updates kept our e-shop running perfectly during peak periods.
testimonials.results: 25% increase in conversions, zero security issues

testimonials.name: Michalis Georgiou
testimonials.content: The adinfinity team didn't just do maintenance for us, but helped strategically evolve our platform along with our business growth.

addons.name: Emergency Support
addons.desc: Immediate support for critical issues outside business hours

addons.name: Extra Development Hours
addons.desc: Additional development hours when you need more than the included ones

seo.title: Web Maintenance & Support | Website Maintenance | Retainer Services | adinfinity
seo.description: Professional web maintenance and support services for Greek market. Security updates, performance monitoring, ongoing development. Retainer plans for continuous support.
